name: alterlab-pytdc
description: Loads Therapeutics Data Commons (TDC, PyTDC) AI-ready drug-discovery datasets and benchmarks — ADME, toxicity, drug-target interaction (DTI), scaffold splits, and molecular oracles for therapeutic ML and pharmacological prediction. Use when fetching a standardized benchmark dataset, applying scaffold or cold-split evaluation, or sourcing labeled molecules for ADMET, toxicity, or DTI modeling. Sources data, splits, and oracles only — defer molecular featurization (ECFP/fingerprints), model traini
author: AlterLab-IEU
